title: NG17 8GJ, Alkane Energy CM Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3229LD/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Alkane Energy CM Limited Installation name: Kirkby in Ashfield Energy Park Permit number: EPR/EP3229LD  "
